summary: Iteration 23 - EchoLayout 2D Floor Plan Enhancements Complete. All 3 new features verified: 1) Guest assignment to tables with green badge indicator, 2) PDF/BEO export modal with Banquet Event Order fields, 3) Template save/load to MongoDB with full CRUD operations. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components and integrations working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: EchoLayout 2D Designer loads correctly with Load, Save, PNG, BEO buttons in header
Save modal opens with Template Name, Event Name, Venue fields - saves to MongoDB successfully
Load modal shows all saved templates from MongoDB with Load and Delete buttons
BEO export modal has all required fields: Event Name, Venue, Contact Person, Event Date, Setup Style, Guaranteed Count
Guest assignment works: selecting round/rect table shows guest input in Properties panel
Guest count badge (green circle) appears on tables with assigned guests
Template CRUD fully functional: POST creates, GET lists/retrieves, PUT updates, DELETE removes
Guest data persists correctly in templates (tested with 2-5 guests per table)
Layout presets (Banquet Rounds, Theatre, Classroom, Cocktail, U-Shape) generate correct floor plans
Section colors (A-F) display correctly with seat counts per section
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed templates during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified all EchoLayout 2D Floor Plan enhancements. Navigation: 1) Open EchoLayout panel with window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('open-panel', { detail: { id: 'layout' } })), 2) Click 'Open 2D Designer' button, 3) Click a preset like 'Banquet Rounds' to populate tables, 4) Click a table to select it and see Properties panel with guest assignment. Key data-testids: save-template-btn, load-template-btn, export-beo-btn, export-png-btn, guest-input, add-guest-btn, template-name-input, confirm-save-btn, beo-event-input, beo-contact-input, beo-date-input, beo-setup-input, beo-count-input, export-beo-confirm-btn. Existing templates in MongoDB: 'Tavistock Ballroom', 'Corporate Gala Banquet'.

backend_tests.verify_update_persisted: PASS - GET after PUT returns updated data
backend_tests.template_structure_valid: PASS - All templates have required fields

frontend_tests.echolayout_dashboard_loads: PASS - Shows 2D Floor Plan, 3D Designer, Room Scanner cards
frontend_tests.2d_designer_opens: PASS - Opens with Load, Save, PNG, BEO buttons
frontend_tests.layout_presets_work: PASS - Banquet Rounds generates 20 tables, 160 seats
frontend_tests.save_modal_opens: PASS - Shows Template Name, Event Name, Venue fields
frontend_tests.save_modal_saves_to_mongodb: PASS - Template appears in Load modal after save
frontend_tests.load_modal_opens: PASS - Shows list of saved templates
frontend_tests.load_modal_shows_templates: PASS - Found 3 templates including newly saved
frontend_tests.beo_modal_has_all_fields: PASS - Event, Contact, Date, Setup, Count inputs present
frontend_tests.table_selection_works: PASS - Clicking table shows Properties panel
frontend_tests.guest_input_visible: PASS - Guest input and add button in Properties
frontend_tests.guest_badge_appears: PASS - Green badge shows guest count on table

guest_assignment.select_table: Click on round/rect table to select
guest_assignment.guest_input: Properties panel shows guest input with add button
guest_assignment.add_guest: Enter name and click + to add guest
guest_assignment.guest_list: Shows numbered list of guests (e.g., '1. John Smith')
guest_assignment.guest_badge: Green circle badge on table shows guest count
guest_assignment.guest_limit: Shows 'GUESTS (X/Y)' where Y is seat capacity

beo_export.floor_plan_summary: Shows room dimensions, table count, seat count
beo_export.guests_assigned_count: Shows total guests assigned across all tables
beo_export.export_button: Export BEO button generates PDF-like image

template_save_load.save_modal: Template Name, Event Name, Venue fields
template_save_load.load_modal: Lists all templates with Load and Delete buttons
template_save_load.load_template: Clicking Load populates floor plan with saved elements
template_save_load.delete_template: Clicking Delete removes template from MongoDB
template_save_load.update_existing: Save button shows 'Update' when editing existing template
